description: Originally launched on Ethereum in Q1 2024, Ondo (ONDO) is the governance token of Ondo Finance, a Real World Asset (RWA) project founded in 2021. Now as a 1:1 price-indexing token on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 ONDO gives original ONDO holders, users and traders instant finality, ultra-low fees, and AI contract capability for faster, more secure, and more scalable use worldwide.
name: Ondo
